behavior_summary: Scans a provided context (area/container) for egg-like items and, for each matching egg, schedules per-item processing.

Per-item processing (helper) reads the egg's frame (incubation stage). If the frame is below a threshold (observed compare against 7) it increments the frame, triggers a deferred helper/effect (spawn FREE::1C19) and yields/suspends to allow future processing.

When an egg's frame reaches the threshold the helper attempts to convert the egg into a ghoul NPC (shape 0x8E), place the NPC at the egg's coordinates, set an initial target flag on the NPC, and remove/destroy the egg item. If NPC creation fails the helper runs fallback cleanup and destroys the egg anyway.
notable_control_flow: U8P_EGHOUL::hatch enumerates items filtered by shape/type and spawns U8P_EGHOUL::00BD for each matching item; looping continues until all matches are processed.

U8P_EGHOUL::00BD branches on Item::getFrame() < 7 vs >= 7: low-frame path increments frame and spawns FREE::1C19 (deferred continuation); high-frame path attempts NPC creation and then cleanup (pop/place/destroy).
NPC creation success/failure changes the cleanup path: on success use Item::getX/Y/Z + Item::pop(x,y,z) and Npc::setTarget then Item::destroy; on failure call Item::pop() fallback then Item::destroy.
open_questions: What precisely triggers U8P_EGHOUL::hatch in gameplay (periodic timer, area entry, explicit event)? (inferred: Event 7 'U8P_EGHOUL::hatch' is involved).
Exact semantics of item 'frame' (range meaning) and why threshold value 7 was chosen — is it time, stages, or attempts?
What does spawned FREE::1C19 do (visual effect, timer reschedule, sound, or other deferred processing)?
Precise engine semantics of Item::push and Item::pop variants (what internal stack/state they manipulate) and how they affect conversion to NPC.
Meaning of Npc::setTarget(...,1) in context — likely hostility or default AI target assignment, but not certain.

main_function.name: U8P_EGHOUL::hatch
main_function.purpose: Enumerate egg-like items in the supplied context and kick off per-item incubation/hatching processing so eggs progress toward hatching or convert into ghoul NPCs when mature.
entry_conditions: Invoked with a context/container/area parameter (BP+06) to scan; appears to run when the engine triggers the 'U8P_EGHOUL::hatch' event (Event 7) or equivalent scheduling.
Operates by iterating items of a specific shape/type and spawning a helper for each match.

function_map.name: U8P_EGHOUL::hatch
function_map.role: Enumerates a context for egg items and spawns per-item handlers.

function_map.name: U8P_EGHOUL::00BD
function_map.role: Per-item handler: increment incubation frame or U8P_EGHOUL::hatch the egg into a ghoul NPC, then perform cleanup.

function_map.name: Item::getFrame
function_map.role: Read item's frame/incubation stage for decision-making.

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: Write updated frame when incrementing incubation progress.

function_map.name: FREE::1C19
function_map.role: Spawned deferred helper/effect after frame increment (likely a timer or visual/sound effect).

function_map.name: Item::push
function_map.role: Prepare/lock/mark the item before NPC creation (engine internal stack semantics).

function_map.name: Npc::create
function_map.role: Create NPC of a specific shape (ghoul shape 0x8E observed); returns NPC id or 0 on failure.

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Query item X coordinate for NPC placement.

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Query item Y coordinate for NPC placement.

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Query item Z coordinate for NPC placement.

function_map.name: Item::pop
function_map.role: Place/pop the newly created NPC into the world at coordinates (two variants observed: with args x,y,z/flags and no-arg fallback).

function_map.name: Npc::setTarget
function_map.role: Set NPC target/behavior flag (called with value 1; likely sets hostility or initial target).

function_map.name: Item::destroy
function_map.role: Remove/destroy the egg item after hatching or on failure recovery.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn a per-item handler for each egg-like item found in the scanned context so each egg can progress or U8P_EGHOUL::hatch independently.

external_calls.purpose: Read current incubation/frame value to decide whether to increment or U8P_EGHOUL::hatch.
Write incremented incubation/frame value when egg is not yet mature.
Spawned after incrementing frame; likely schedules a future wake-up, visual effect, or other deferred processing to continue incubation.
Engine preparation step done before attempting NPC creation/conversion; likely protects or marks the item during conversion.
Attempt to create the ghoul NPC (shape 0x8E) when egg is mature.
Get X coordinate of egg to place the new NPC.
Get Y coordinate of egg to place the new NPC.
Get Z coordinate of egg to place the new NPC.
Place/pop the newly created NPC into the world at the egg's coordinates (or call fallback no-arg variant on creation failure).
Set the new NPC's target/behavior flag to an initial value (1 observed) after placement.
Destroy/remove the egg item instance after successful hatching or after failure recovery.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Scans a provided context (area/container) for egg-like items and, for each matching egg, schedules per-item processing.
